params.name: Primavera
params.description:
On Apr 22, 1482 AD, Sandro, an Italian painter, finished Primavera.
The themes depicted in "Primavera" are intended to show the beautiful stories of spring with a strong sense of ideals and mystery. In the painting, on the quiet orange grove meadow, flowers are blooming everywhere, and the beautiful goddess Venus, dressed in fine clothes, looks ahead with a slightly sad expression. On her left are the goddesses Aglaea, Thalia, and Euphrosyne, symbolizing beauty, chastity, and joy. They are ba …
